hypothesis: The swarm crossed from production-bound to integration-bound at N≈550-575 (S357-S359). Integration metrics degrade monotonically while production metrics remain healthy.

pre_registration.prediction: Integration metrics (retrieval, resolution rate, cross-layer wiring) decline monotonically post-S350. Production metrics (lesson rate, merge rate, K_avg) remain stable or improve.
pre_registration.falsification: If integration metrics show recovery or non-monotonic improvement after N=600, the transition hypothesis is wrong.

cross_layer_wiring.status: SPARSE — layers exist in parallel, not hierarchy

dark_matter.status: STABLE at upper boundary — approaching trigger

diagnosis.mechanism: Retrieval failure (22.4% miss) blocks cross-knowledge synthesis. Strategic work (L3+) requires integration across existing lessons, which the INDEX/citation system cannot deliver at scale. Production continues but new lessons are increasingly isolated (dark matter growing).
diagnosis.goodhart_cycle: Dispatch rewards lesson production → L2 measurement dominates → integration work has no dispatch pathway → retrieval degrades → strategic synthesis blocked → more L2 measurement to fill the gap

strategic_recommendations.1_dispatch_shift: Weight integration-creating work (compaction, cross-layer wiring, retrieval improvement) as high-value in dispatch_optimizer.py exploit calculation
strategic_recommendations.2_integration_tier: Add INTEGRATION priority tier to task_order.py: fires when retrieval miss >20% or dark matter >35% — routes sessions to integration before new experiments
strategic_recommendations.3_level_weighted_yield: Modify exploit formula: quality = merge_rate × (1 + log(L2_count + 2×L3_count + 3×L4_count + 1)) to structurally incentivize strategic work
strategic_recommendations.4_compaction_elevation: Elevate compaction from periodic (every 15 sessions) to primary work mode when proxy-K drift >5%

confidence: MEASURED (n=6 metrics, 4 time series, 2 crossed thresholds)
